ideation: This animation sequence will depict a robot playfully holding an imaginary avocado.  The movement will be gentle and slightly awkward, to reflect the robot's non-human nature interacting with a natural object.  The sequence will focus on the right arm primarily, with the left arm providing a counterpoint. Frame 1 will show both arms at rest. Frame 2 will show the right arm reaching out and gently cupping the imaginary avocado. Frame 3 will show the right arm holding the avocado close, and the left arm gesturing in a slightly questioning way. Frame 4 will show a slight adjustment to the hold, and then in frame 5, both arms return to their resting position.

frames.beat: both arms hang relaxed at the sides
the right arm reaches out, cupping air gently
holding the imaginary fruit, left arm asks 'what's this?'
a slight adjustment to the avocado's grip
both arms return to a relaxed, resting state
